user.title: Create Input Boolean Group
user.description: Group multiple input_boolean entities into a single controllable entity.

data_description.all_mode: When enabled, the group is only on when ALL members are on. When disabled, the group is on if ANY member is on.

error.no_entities: You must select at least one input_boolean entity.

init.title: Edit Input Boolean Group
init.description: Update the group members and behavior.

data_description.all_mode: When enabled, the group is only on when ALL members are on. When disabled, the group is on if ANY member is on.

error.no_entities: You must select at least one input_boolean entity.
